headline: Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Pulls Back From Records As Oil Jumps 6% On Hormuz Tensions
summary: Crude oil spikes 6% and Brent tops $95 after a turbulent weekend renewed U.S.-Iran tensions, pulling Wall Street back from last week's record highs.
